name: Hebei
description: Major pharma API hub — penicillin, paracetamol, cephalosporin precursors. Heavy winter production curtailments.

name: Jiangsu
description: High-tech pharma manufacturing + rare earth separation. Yangtze River Delta export corridor.

name: Zhejiang
description: Export-oriented pharma zone — fluoroquinolones, statins, and chemical synthesis hub.

name: Shandong
description: Major producer of antibiotics, vitamins, and intermediate chemicals.

name: Hubei
description: Central logistics hub — penicillin G, salbutamol, and ranitidine manufacturing. COVID epicenter experience.

name: Inner Mongolia
description: World's largest rare earth mining and primary processing region — 60% of global REE output.

name: Sichuan
description: Significant rare earth mining + lithium processing hub. Earthquake and flood risk zone.

name: Guangdong
description: Major export port — rare earth magnets, electronics, and high-value pharma intermediates.

name: Jiangxi
description: Heavy rare earth mining center — dysprosium, europium, yttrium extraction.

name: Fujian
description: Xiamen tungsten + rare earth processing. Key maritime export corridor to India.

name: Hunan
description: Yttrium and heavy rare earth mining region — growing separation capacity.

name: Liaoning
description: Northeast pharma corridor — chemical synthesis and veterinary API production.
